seoTitle: East Devonport vs East Ridgley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Devonport and East Ridgley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Devonport vs East Ridgley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Devonport and East Ridgley.
heading: East Devonport vs East Ridgley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Devonport, Tasmania and East Ridgley, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Devonport has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to East Ridgley (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Devonport or East Ridgley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Devonport has a flood risk score of 40/100, while East Ridgley scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Devonport scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. East Ridgley scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Devonport or East Ridgley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Devonport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
